message:
🌱 atlantis: Streaming does not appear to work properly with ALB (#1058)

* 🌱 Add atlantis: Streaming does not appear to work properly with ALB mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: clarify atlantis#2026 resolution — nginx config workaround, no code fix PR

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-2026-streaming-does-not-appear-to-work-properly-with-alb",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Streaming does not appear to work properly with ALB",
+    "description": "Streaming does not appear to work properly with ALB. This issue affects 51+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\n### Community Note\n\n* Please vote on this issue by adding a \ud83d\udc4d [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Streaming does not appear to work properly with ALB",
+        "description": "In our case this was not the AWS ALB but instead it was the nginx sidecar container we have running alongside atlantis in ECS Fargate.\n\nAdding the following settings in nginx.conf resolved the issue for us.\n\n```\n    location / {\n      # redirect all traffic to the backend\n      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;\n      proxy_set_header Host $http_host;\n      proxy_pass http://${APP}:${APP_PORT};\n\n      # WebSocket\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade atlantis to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade atlantis:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade atlantis atlantis/atlantis --namespace atlantis\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis\nhelm list -n atlantis\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Streaming does not appear to work properly with\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Note: No code fix PR exists \u2014 this is resolved via an nginx configuration workaround (proxy_buffering off, chunked_transfer_encoding on). In our case this was not the AWS ALB but instead it was the nginx sidecar container we have running alongside atlantis in ECS Fargate.\n\nAdding the following settings in nginx.conf resolved the issue for us.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "atlantis",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "atlantis"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/2026",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis"
+    },
+    "reactions": 51,
+    "comments": 31,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
